hero.title: Built for Real-time Laser Tag
hero.description: RayZ is a full-stack IoT laser tag system combining ESP32 embedded devices with a modern web platform. From custom firmware running FreeRTOS to a Next.js dashboard with live WebSocket communication — every layer is purpose-built for competitive, real-time gameplay.
